profile.name: Ritesh Kumar
profile.title: Freelance Full-Stack Web Developer
profile.bio: Need a website or planning to build a powerful, scalable web application? I'm Ritesh Kumar, a Freelance Full Stack Web Developer for Hire with 4+ years of experience building custom websites, web applications, SaaS platforms, and e-commerce solutions for startups, agencies, and enterprises worldwide. I help businesses transform ideas into high-performing, scalable, and secure digital products. I work both as an individual developer and lead a team of 10+ experienced developers.

hero.heading: Building Powerful, Scalable Custom Web Solutions
hero.subheading: Freelance Full-Stack Developer with 4+ years of experience crafting SaaS platforms, scrapers, APIs, and e-commerce websites.

services.title: Freelance Custom Web Development
services.description: Custom website development from scratch tailored perfectly to your business requirements. SEO-friendly and highly optimized code.

services.title: Full Stack Web Enterprise Applications
services.description: Robust frontend + backend modules leveraging technologies like PHP (Symfony/Laravel), Node.js, and React.js for clean solutions.

services.title: SaaS & Dashboard Software Development
services.description: High-performing Software-as-a-Service platforms, interactive dashboards, CRM workflows, and robust management systems.

services.title: E-Commerce Integrations
services.description: Custom storefronts and systems on top of Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom databases with secured payment integration gateway loops.

services.title: API Development & Third-Party Integration
services.description: Building production-grade secured REST / GraphQL APIs and seamlessly integrating third-party systems for seamless data transfer.

services.title: Python Web Scraping & Workflow Automation
services.description: High-volume data mining and extraction systems utilizing Scrapy, Selenium with rotation proxies, and clean CSV/Excel output.

projects.title: OmniScrape - Large-Scale Retail Monitoring
projects.description: A secure and highly distributed data extraction system that tracks 50,000+ SKUs across multiple major international e-commerce directories in real-time. Leverages sophisticated headless browsers, automated browser profiles, proxy rotation, and smart bypass techniques to scrape accurate retail lists with continuous health logs.
features: Proxy rotation and automatic header spoofing logs
Durable PostgreSQL schema storing product listings and historic pricing trends
Trigger alarms and alerts on system failure or layout changes
Data export to Google Sheets and external custom endpoints
projects.seoTitle: OmniScrape E-commerce Scraper Portfolio - Ritesh Kumar
projects.seoDescription: Automated real-time scraping system built with Python, Scrapy, and Selenium tracking millions of items monthly.

projects.title: Apex CRM & Client Portal Custom SaaS
projects.description: A premium business workflows platform custom-built for an advertising agency to handle customer onboarding, invoicing schedules, secure storage drives, and real-time support chat. Complete with a secure Symfony-powered administrative core which manages project pipelines, ticket queues, and roles authorization.
features: Bespoke single-page client interface built with React and Tailwind CSS
Comprehensive project pipeline logs and financial invoicing charts
Integrated ticket tracking with custom automatic email response notifications
Secured roles authorization with fine-grained admin filters
projects.seoTitle: Apex CRM Agency SaaS Portfolio - Ritesh Kumar
projects.seoDescription: Secure business CRM platform built using PHP Symfony, MySQL, and dynamic React modules.

projects.title: SwiftStore - Customized Headless E-commerce
projects.description: A fast, headless Shopify store variant configured in Next.js. Equipped with premium layout optimization patterns, lightning-fast static item search filters, instant checkout tunnels via Stripe and PayPal, and a customizable CMS allowing product customizer options.
features: Static site rendering yielding top SEO ranks and sub-second page loads
Interactive item filters on sizing, brand, tags, and colors
Integrated secure token payment portals (Stripe checkout loops)
Backend webhooks syncing fulfillment items with physical inventories automatically
projects.seoTitle: SwiftStore Headless NextJS Shop - Ritesh Kumar
projects.seoDescription: Modern serverless headless shop built using Next.js and Tailwind, integrated with Stripe Payments.

projects.title: Foundation Environmental
projects.description: Professional environmental services platform. Handled design implementation, content structuring, performance optimization, and responsive functionality across desktop and tablet.
features: WordPress content management with highly structured environmental reports
Full layout responsiveness spanning desktop, tablet, and mobile devices
Speed optimization and advanced local search engine optimizations
projects.seoDescription: Professional environmental services website designed and optimized by Ritesh Kumar.

projects.title: Afrikeyez Football — Transfers Section

features: Real-time sports media layouts and content scheduling integration

High-performance media streaming and optimized asset deliverability
projects.seoDescription: African football transfers section built and optimized by Ritesh Kumar.

Robust enterprise Content Management integration supporting daily updates
projects.seoTitle: IES University Academic Website - Ritesh Kumar
projects.seoDescription: Full-scale educational enterprise web portal for IES University, Bhopal.

features: Cross-browser and legacy system compatibility adjustments
Bid management logs with dynamic updates
Upgraded frontend responsive interactions and styling tweaks
projects.seoDescription: Tender and bidding consultation platform optimized by Ritesh Kumar.

features: Secured roles workflow tracker and status change logs
Optimized client analytics visual reports and listings search

projects.seoTitle: TrendCatch Business Web Maintenance - Ritesh Kumar

experience.description: Building scalable custom websites, SaaS interfaces, and business workflow automations for client bases across US, UK, and European regions. Directing full lifecycle scopes spanning database setups, secure client portals, e-commerce integrations, and high-performance frontend designs.
Architecting high-volume extraction tools parsing complex JavaScript-rendered online websites. Delivering automated leads pipelines and pricing tracking monitors with 99%+ record integrity.
Delivered scalable enterprise web interfaces using ASP.NET Core and SQL Server databases. Formulated performant web APis transferring secure client parameters across systems.
Collaborated in crafting PHP-based client platforms using Laravel. Programmed custom AJAX layout scripts to improve interactions.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech), Computer Software Engineering
education.description: Graduated with rich software engineering foundations, data structures, MVC modeling, and relational database management methodologies.
Focused in mathematics, physics, and computer science foundations with deep analytical training.

testimonials.message: Ritesh delivered our bespoke CRM system on time, with flawless dynamic interfaces. He has incredible technical clarity and his team scaled development perfectly. Highly recommended!
Our catalog is dynamically scraped and tracked across thousands of lines of SKUs continuously. Ritesh's Python web scraping pipelines reduced manual updates by 30+ hours/week!

blogs.title: Why Symfony is Still My Top Choice for Complex Enterprise SaaS backends
blogs.content: PHP has undergone a massive renaissance, and Symfony is at the forefront of this evolution. When constructing critical software pipelines, its dependency injection container, micro-kernel architecture, and powerful Doctrine ORM are exceptional assets. In this article, I discuss how Symfony's strict coding standards prevent bugs and outline custom commands routines that accelerate deployments.
blogs.seoTitle: Why PHP Symfony commands Enterprise Power - Ritesh Kumar Blog
blogs.seoDescription: An in-depth guide regarding PHP Symfony's enterprise strengths including state management, testing, and Doctrine ORM structures.

blogs.title: Mastering Headless Scrapers: Mitigating CAPTCHAs and Bot Detection
blogs.content: Modern websites are highly guarded by Cloudflare, Akamai, and behavioral analysis engines. Writing robust data miners is more artwork than simple parsing. This guide details practical proxy rotation loops, user agent spoofing logs, rendering Javascript securely with Selenium headless browser contexts, and structuring parallel Scrapy pipelines.
blogs.seoTitle: Bypassing Bot Detectors in High-Volume Web Scraping - Ritesh Kumar
blogs.seoDescription: Learn to build resilient headless crawling engines with automated proxy cycling and stealth configurations.
